title: gladiolus andrewsii
intro: Gladiolus andrewsii, also known as the Andrews' gladiolus or desert glory lily, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus andrewsii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Gladiolus andrewsii is typically prepared as a tincture or infused oil for herbal use, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment for skin issues.
